summary: The diff implements fixes in frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts and frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection.tsx that address both REQ-1 (Address column resolution) and REQ-2 (packet count aggregation). REQ-1 is addressed by adding findAddressColumnIndex(), findHwidColumnIndex(), resolveUnitId() helpers and expanding INVALID_UNIT_IDS. REQ-2 is addressed by adding resolvedSampleRecords to ParseDebugInfo so numeric counts are available. Both requirements appear substantially implemented.
